faqs.question: How much does bed bug treatment cost in Van Nest?
faqs.answer: Bed bug treatment in Van Nest typically ranges from $1,200 to $3,500 depending on the size of your home, severity of infestation, and treatment method chosen. Single-room treatments start at the lower end, while whole-home heat treatments for larger Van Nest properties may reach the higher range. We provide free inspections and detailed quotes before any work begins.

faqs.question: How long does bed bug treatment take in a Van Nest apartment?
faqs.answer: Most bed bug treatments in Van Nest apartments take 4-6 hours for heat treatment or 2-3 hours for chemical application. Heat treatments provide same-day results, while chemical treatments typically require a follow-up visit 10-14 days later. Our technicians work efficiently to minimize disruption to your Van Nest household while ensuring complete bed bug elimination.

faqs.question: Are bed bugs common in Van Nest, Bronx?
faqs.answer: Yes, bed bugs are a common issue throughout Van Nest and the Bronx due to the area's dense housing, proximity to public transportation, and high population density. Multi-family buildings along Morris Park Avenue and older homes near Bronxdale Avenue are particularly susceptible.
